Fill rate → target
Quick calculator — drag fill rate to set this month's target automatically
It’s rarely realistic to fill every open vacancy in a single month — pick a realistic target for what we actually aim to hit. The fill rate % shows what that target represents against the open backlog. Most months land in the Typical (40%) range. Adjusting here updates the currently selected month (top-right picker). You can still override per-month below.
